Just wanted to acknowledge I received refunds on my 2 accounts on the Hakeem Jefferies market on  @Polymarket . While I still strongly believe that the market should have settled in favor of the title/rules/order book price at the time, I thank the team for a pretty fast refund.

Cheers!

After getting rugged of almost all my funds on the absolute most worse and nonsense clarification on Hakeem Jefferies which was against the title/rules/prevailing order book on my @HiveLiveHQ  tournament account, I'm above BE. ($500 was the starting balance). https://t.co/LXuF8r97xS
I gotta say on prediction markets, betting no on Spencer Pratt may have been one of the biggest farms so far this year.

If you look at just the live election results you might think Steyer/Raman are far behind but if you look at prediction markets you can see Steyer is still alive and Raman is priced ahead of Pratt to advance. 

This is one of the most valuable uses of PMs, providing clarity.
Currently Nithya is ahead in the odds on @Polymarket to advance despite being 7% down from Spencer in the actual current results. https://t.co/D4kHplPyv9
Great explanation
@Polymarket alpha tip of the day: the more animals you know trading prediction markets, the more edge you have.

RIP Google Trends Raccoon
🦝

Drawing parallels between Cal Governor D candidates and 2020 D presidential primary. Here's my quips:

Becerra - Latino Joe Biden in his 4th year and infinitely more inept without having dementia as an excuse
Steyer - Bernie if he was a billionaire (or Steyer 2020 himself)
Porter - Chubby Elizabeth Warren (also has Warren's endorsement and states she's her mentor)
Mahan - Not Gay Buttigieg
Villa - Los Angeles Michael Bloomberg
